name: Chest Hypertrophy
description: Jeff Nippard's 8-Week Chest Hypertrophy Program - 2 days per week, progressive overload with bench press focus

phases.name: Main Program
phases.description: 8-week progressive chest hypertrophy program with volume and intensity increases

exercises.name: Bench Press
exercises.notes: 75-80% 1RM. Wider grip, bigger arch, slight pause on chest for each rep

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.notes: 30-45 degree bench angle, retract shoulder blades, flare elbows

exercises.name: Banded Pushup
exercises.notes: Squeeze pecs at the top of each rep. Full ROM: touch nose to floor

exercises.name: Flat Dumbbell Static Hold
exercises.notes: 40% 1RM. Hold DBs in stretched position for 60 seconds, add time each week

exercises.name: Close Grip Bench Press
exercises.notes: Shoulder width grip, less arch, slight pause on chest

exercises.name: Bayesian Cable Flye
exercises.notes: Cables high at shoulder height, perform seated, palms face down

exercises.name: Bodyweight Dip
exercises.notes: 3 second negative on each rep, lean slightly forward
